name: Jeff Foxworthy
bio: Jeff Foxworthy is an American stand-up comedian best known for his You Might Be a Redneck one-liners and his observational comedy about Southern and working-class life. His 1993 album You Might Be a Redneck If... topped the comedy charts and went multi-platinum, and he became a centerpiece of the Blue Collar Comedy Tour, making him one of the best-selling comedy recording artists of all time.

timeline.ev: Album You Might Be a Redneck If... released

accolades: First album certified multi-platinum by the RIAA
